name: pulsechat
description: PulseChat — salons de clavardage temps réel (Cloudflare Workers + Durable Objects)

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n ui,worker -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.deploy: npm run build:frontend && wrangler d1 migrations apply pulsechat --remote && wrangler deploy
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build:frontend
